name: lemoncrow
description: LemonCrow AI coding runtime for Antigravity. Context, code-intel, memory, and tracing for agentic workflows.

interface.shortDescription: LemonCrow tools and agents for agy.
interface.longDescription: Bundle the LemonCrow MCP server, specialized agents (code, explore, plan, execute, review, research, solve), and skills for Antigravity. Start coding tasks with LemonCrow context, use LemonCrow MCP tools before native host tools, and treat native reads/search/shell as fallback only when LemonCrow is unavailable.
